values.value: {"id":"starter-bundle","label":"Starter Bundle","description":"Core product plus standard support, single quote.","parameters":[{"name":"opportunityId","type":"string","required":true},{"name":"quantity","type":"number","required":false,"default":1}],"nodes":[{"alias":"quote","objectApiName":"Quote","op":"create","fields":{"Name":"Starter Bundle","OpportunityId":"${opportunityId}","Status":"Draft"}},{"alias":"line_core","objectApiName":"QuoteLineItem","op":"create","parentAlias":"quote","parentField":"QuoteId","fields":{"Product2Id":"SKU-CORE","Quantity":"${quantity|1}"}},{"alias":"line_support","objectApiName":"QuoteLineItem","op":"create","parentAlias":"quote","parentField":"QuoteId","fields":{"Product2Id":"SKU-SUPPORT","Quantity":1}}]}
